title: stelis parvula
intro: Stelis parvula, also known as the small stelis or tiny stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Stelis parvula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Stelis parvula is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support various health conditions.
